subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! In truth, thou hast fallen into great hardship and difficulty, yet this is a mercy, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان انصاف اینست که خیلی در مشقت و زحمت افتادی ولی رحمتست زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort
